required_skills: Educational strategy development and institutional improvement planning
Curriculum evaluation and academic program assessment against national or international standards
Stakeholder engagement and advisory skills for working with school leaders, teachers, and policy makers
Data-driven needs analysis and gap assessment for academic institutions or EdTech organizations
Knowledge of K-12, higher education, and/or corporate learning ecosystems and policy frameworks
Proposal writing, project scoping, and consultancy report preparation for education sector clients
Change management and professional development facilitation for educators and academic staff
Understanding of global education frameworks including NEP 2020, Common Core, IB, and Cambridge
preferred_skills: EdTech product evaluation and technology adoption advisory for schools and universities
International school accreditation processes (IB, Cambridge, WASC, NEASC)
Grant writing and education funding proposal development for government or NGO clients
Social-emotional learning (SEL) program design and student well-being strategy consulting
Public-private partnership facilitation in the education sector
Quantitative and qualitative research methodology for education impact measurement
Experience working with government bodies such as CBSE, UGC, AICTE, or state education departments
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive institutional needs assessments for schools, universities, and EdTech companies, identifying academic, operational, and technology gaps
Develop strategic education improvement plans with clearly defined milestones, KPIs, and resource allocation recommendations for client institutions
Advise school leadership and academic boards on curriculum design, teacher training frameworks, and pedagogical best practices aligned with NEP 2020 or international standards
Design and facilitate professional development workshops and capacity-building programs for educators to improve instructional quality and student outcomes
Evaluate EdTech products and digital learning platforms, producing evidence-based recommendation reports for institutional procurement decisions
Lead stakeholder interviews, focus groups, and surveys with students, teachers, parents, and administrators to gather data for consultancy engagements
Prepare and present detailed consultancy reports, project proposals, and executive briefings for C-suite and government education stakeholders
Support accreditation and compliance processes for educational institutions seeking IB, Cambridge, CBSE, or NAAC recognition
Build and manage long-term client relationships through regular progress reviews, course corrections, and demonstration of measurable impact on educational outcomes
Monitor education sector trends, policy changes, and research publications to continuously refine and update advisory frameworks delivered to clients
